title: Swords & Shields
body:
This is a medieval modpack with magic and dragons.
Main mods are: Castleblocks, which adds the trowel to make castle bricks, better combat (self explenatory), epic knights, which adds new knight armor and weapons, most of the mods from the rpg series, which add magic, new bows and some armor, useless reptiles, which adds ridable dragons, and some QOL mods.

All of the autors of the mods can be found in-game in the mods menu.
